ul.li: Durability Guarantee: The mx_frame update in SHM must only occur after the fsync() of the WAL file.
Memory Layouts: WAL frame header is exactly 24 bytes, followed by page_size data bytes.
Write Barriers: Sequence diagram highlights where hardware memory barriers (SFENCE) are required to prevent out-of-order stores from leaking a partial transaction to readers.
Hash Join Constraints: Built as a fixed-slot hash table with linked-list collision resolution (pointers indicated in build phase).

g.text: WAL Header Layout (32 Bytes total) | sizeof=32
WAL Frame Layout (Header + Page Data) | sizeof=24+page_size
